name: Team Disorder Special Edition
short_description: Team Disorder Special Edition is an SCI-Fi Pirate action-based game!
detailed_description:
Team Disorder is an open-world game that features first-person (FP) and third-person (TP) modes. The game includes four extensive open-world maps, which consist of large beaches, scenic villages, and urban jungles. Most buildings within the game are multi-story, with some reaching up to eight floors.

The narrative begins with the main character, Jack, who is shot down on an unfamiliar planet by alien adversaries after a successful ejection from his "borrowed spaceship." Upon landing, Jack notices that the planet bears a strong resemblance to Earth. He finds himself confronting various villains, a challenge that proves to be significant. With the assistance of his dancer friends, his survival hinges upon repaying them. Jack's abilities are put to the test against multiple types of hostile attacks, including ranged fire, melee combat, and magical assaults. Fortunately, he is equipped with a range of advanced weaponry featuring some traditional elements to aid in his recovery. The game presents notably diverse maps, each containing numerous secret areas. Players will encounter hundreds of advanced AI enemies in each level, necessitating a high level of skill. Team Disorder includes a level selection feature along with a manual save system. Players can progress to the next level by either completing objectives or finding and unlocking glowing spheres. Additionally, magic books provide riddles that lead to considerable secret levels. Engaging with Team Disorder is suggested only when players are fully prepared for the challenges it presents.

This Game Contains Creative Commons Attributes. Visit the website for a full list of credits.
